calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Relief Under Vexatious Litigant Statutes
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER POON AKA TING CHAM POON Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Relief Under Vexatious Litigant Statutes is DENIED. Dismissal of entire action filed on November 22, 2024.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
William Leeds Disston, Esq., Tel. 510.835.8110, appearing for the Plaintiff Legal Recovery, LLC;
Dorothy Wong, Certified Cantonese Court Interpreter, Certification No. 300601, with an oath on file.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT PETER POON AKA TING CHAM POON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

Defendant Ting Cham Poon's motion to quash and vacate the default entered on March 14, 2023, is granted.

The motion is timely. (CCP 473(d); California Capital Insurance Co. v. Hoehn (2024) DJDAR 10673 [void default judgment may be set aside at any time].)

The motion is granted given: (1) the bad blood between the parties and defendant Poon's declaration denying service (Ting Cham Poon Declaration); (2) the policy to hear cases on the merits (McClain v. Kissler (2019) 39 Cal.App.5th 399, 413); (3) process server Mora's lack of credibility in prior litigation (Fu Decl., Ex. A [Statement of Decision, CGC-18-572347]); (4) plaintiff's, Yan's, and counsel Disston's prior bad faith and frivolous conduct in litigation among the parties (Fu Decl., Ex. D [Court of Appeal Opinion, A167818].

Order signed.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: C. Loke. (301/RCE)

Declaration Of Leeds Disston In Support Of Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-31-2024 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2024 Continued To Nov-22-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Leeds Disston, Esq., Tel. 510.835.8110, appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Legal Recovery, LLC;
Peter Poon, appearing in person as a Defendant and Self-Represented Litigant;
Bryant Fu, appearing in person.

Hearing re: DEFENDANT PETER POON AKA TING CHAM POON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

The Court's tentative ruling directed parties to appear.

Appearances are stated in open court. The Court states that a Cantonese-language interpreter was requested and that one is not present here today. Brief discussions regarding a continuance are held.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Defendant Peter Poon Aka Ting Cham Poon's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Or Stay Or Dismiss is continued to Friday, November 22, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. on the Law & Motion calendar to allow time for the Court to secure a Cantonese-language interpreter for Mr. Poon.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Park. (301/RCE)
